title: Sour Chewy Paleo-Friendly Chocolate Pancakes
description: A unique and romantic Argentine dish featuring a mix of sour and chewy textures with the addition of filo pastry and stir-fry elements.
instructions: Mix the chocolate powder, sour cream, and chia seeds in a bowl until well combined.
Arrange filo pastry sheets on a baking sheet. Spread dark chocolate chips evenly over each sheet.
Sprinkle chopped pistachios over chocolate chips.
In another mixing bowl, combine almond flour with coconut oil. Mix until smooth and pourable.
Pour the almond-flour mixture into the center of each filo sheet.
Carefully fold the edges of the filo sheets to enclose the filling. Seal completely around the sides and ends.
Place the assembled filo packs in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 25 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm as a dessert with a side of your favorite paleo-friendly beverages.
